data.content: Implementation review approved. The existing managed-skills doctor check and doctor --fix code paths already handle the knot requirement. The implementation adds a focused CLI regression test (doctor_reports_missing_skills_and_fix_installs_for_preferred_root) covering the full detect-warn-fix-pass cycle including project-over-user root precedence. make sanity passes at 95.01% coverage. No code changes needed beyond the test and changeset. File lengths within limits, no security concerns.
